title: Biodiversitätsindikatoren für europäische Landwirtschaftssysteme
subtitle: Zusammenfassung des Handbuchs
description: A summary of the guidebook presenting a set of 23 scientifically-grounded biodiversity indicators for European agricultural systems, developed under the EU FP7 BioBio project. It describes indicator categories (genetic, species, habitat diversity and management), measurement protocols, case study applications in 15 regions and recommendations for monitoring.
